channel.title: Hydration - Tag - Buffo's Corner

item.title: Angular Enterprise Dashboard - Phase 3A.3: Polishing the Experience — View Transitions & Incremental Hydration
item.description: We’ve built the data pipeline (Part 1) and the dashboard UI (Part 2). The app works. But “works” and “feels amazing” are two very different things.
